ctaBand.title: Let's get acquainted
ctaBand.text: In a conversation, we figure out which assortment fits your business and how we can support you.

hero.title: Your name out front. Our expertise behind you.
hero.subtitle: When customers question a stone, you are not on your own. We craft in Würzburg and support you with licensed gemology, personally and as equals.

quote.text: When a customer questions a diamond, I need someone who gives me the answer right away. That is what Rösler & Engert is for.

atelier.title: From rough stone to your showroom
atelier.subtitle: Everything under one roof in Würzburg. So you can give your customers a clear answer.

inspect.title: Stone inspection
inspect.text: Our gemologist examines every diamond: cut, clarity, color. You know exactly what you are selling.

craft.title: Manufacturing
craft.text: Master goldsmiths craft your collections in our manufactory, precise and on schedule.

finish.title: Final inspection
finish.text: Every piece is checked under the loupe before it leaves our workshop.

deliver.title: Handover
deliver.text: At the showroom, via field service, or by post. Whatever suits your business.

partnerValue.title: What you can expect as a partner
partnerValue.subtitle: Personal, in Würzburg, at eye level.

gemology.title: Stone confidence
gemology.text: Licensed gemologist in-house. For transparent selection and credible sales conversations.

manufacturing.title: In-house production
manufacturing.text: Earrings, rings, and necklaces from our German manufactory, tailored to your assortment.

advisor.title: Personal contact
advisor.text: A dedicated sales advisor who knows your business, your region, and your collections.

service.title: Service that thinks ahead
service.text: Invoice purchase, ring adjustments, engravings, and nationwide shipping.

aboutPreview.title: Craftsmanship across generations
aboutPreview.text: For generations, we have crafted jewelry in Germany for jewelers. Our gemologists and master goldsmiths work in Würzburg, from rough diamond to finished piece.

categories.title: Our expertise
categories.subtitle: Diamond selection, manufacturing, collections. All under one roof.

expertise.title: Gemology and manufacturing in Würzburg
expertise.text: Our gemologist guides diamond selection. In the manufactory, we craft collections that fit your assortment, with quality standards you can stand behind.

craftsmanship.title: Visit our manufactory
craftsmanship.text: See jewelry being made, handle collections, get answers directly. In Würzburg.

diamonds.title: Select diamonds
diamonds.text: Our gemologist guides your selection. Transparent and traceable.

showroom.title: Visit our showroom
showroom.text: Book an appointment in Würzburg and see collections that fit your assortment.

signal1.title: 189+ partners
signal1.text: Jewelers across Germany trust our manufactory.

signal2.title: Made in Germany
signal2.text: In-house production in Würzburg, handcrafted and inspected.

signal3.title: Licensed gemology
signal3.text: In-house gemologist for transparent diamond selection.

signal4.title: 128 years of experience
signal4.text: Craftsmanship across generations, for collections with standards.

hero.title: Craftsmanship across generations
hero.subtitle: B2B partner for handcrafted jewelry and diamonds. Own manufactory in Germany, gemology in-house.

heritage.title: Craft with history
heritage.text: Across generations, we have established ourselves as a manufactory for jewelry. Every piece is created in our workshop in Germany, crafted by master goldsmiths.

leadership.title: The people behind Rösler & Engert
leadership.text: Behind the manufactory are the partners themselves, with a passion for jewelry, diamonds, and honest partnerships. In Würzburg, we combine traditional craftsmanship with a commitment to supporting jewelers over the long term.
leadership.imageAlt: The partners of Rösler & Engert in the manufactory

gemology.title: Licensed gemology
gemology.text: Our gemologist accompanies the entire process: diamond selection, quality inspection, certification. So our partner jewelers know what they are selling.

quality.title: Quality assurance
quality.text: Every piece is inspected in our manufactory, from cut evaluation to final examination under the loupe. Only jewelry and diamonds that meet our standards leave the workshop.

manufacturing.title: In-house manufacturing in Germany
manufacturing.text: In our manufactory, collections for earrings, rings, and necklaces are created, handcrafted and adaptable to your assortment.

hero.title: Handcrafted jewelry for jewelers
hero.subtitle: Collections from Würzburg, for jewelers who let quality speak in the showroom.

earrings.title: Earrings
earrings.description: From classic studs to hoops: handcrafted earrings in gold and with diamonds, for your collection.

rings.title: Rings
rings.description: Engagement rings, solitaires, and band rings, crafted with precision and fine materials.

necklaces.title: Necklaces
necklaces.description: Pendants, collars, and chains that fit into your assortment.

hero.title: Diamonds you can stand behind
hero.subtitle: Our gemologist selects and certifies every stone. Transparent and traceable.

expertise.title: Gemological expertise
expertise.text: From rough stone selection to cut evaluation, our gemologist accompanies the process. A wide range of cuts and quality grades for your assortment.

cta.text: Schedule a conversation. We will learn about your business and support you from the first collection onward.

showroom.point3: Book appointments online or by phone

fieldService.title: Field service visits
fieldService.text: Our sales team visits your store on request.
fieldService.point1: On-site consultation in your jewelry store
fieldService.point2: Samples and collections brought directly to you

hero.title: Frequently asked questions
hero.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions about B2B partnership with Rösler & Engert.

partnership.question: How do I become a B2B partner?
partnership.answer: Contact us via the contact form or book an appointment. We will discuss your business and suitable terms in person.

minimumOrder.question: Are there minimum order quantities?
minimumOrder.answer: Terms depend on collection and partnership. In a personal conversation, we find the right solution for your business.

catalog.question: How do I get the catalog?
catalog.answer: Download our digital catalog on the catalog page. After completing the form, you will receive the PDF link by email.

customization.question: Is customization possible?
customization.answer: Yes. Ring adjustments, engraving, and collection-specific adaptations are part of our service.

shipping.question: How does shipping work?
shipping.answer: We deliver nationwide, securely packed and reliably to your store.

appointment.question: How do I book an appointment?
appointment.answer: Use the appointment link on our website or call us. We look forward to your visit in Würzburg or at your location.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.text: Our team is happy to advise you personally.

sections.heading: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)
paragraphs:
Rösler & Engert GbR
Domstr. 18
97070 Würzburg
Germany
Represented by: the partners Christian Roesler and Markus Engert

Phone: +49 (0) 931 45 25 28 92
Email: info@roesler-engert.de

sections.heading: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV
paragraphs:
Christian Roesler
Domstr. 18
97070 Würzburg

sections.heading: EU dispute resolution
paragraphs: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
You can find our email address above in the imprint.
We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.heading: Liability for content
paragraphs: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 (1) DDG. However, pursuant to §§ 8 to 10 DDG, we are not obliged as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances indicating illegal activity.

Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific infringement. Upon becoming aware of corresponding legal violations, we will remove such content immediately.

sections.heading: Liability for links
paragraphs: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.

The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking. However, permanent monitoring of the content of linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a legal violation. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.

sections.heading: Copyright
paragraphs: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution, or any form of commercialization beyond the scope of copyright law requires the written consent of the respective author or creator.

Downloads and copies of this site are permitted only for private, non-commercial use. Where content on this site was not created by the operator, third-party copyrights are respected. In particular, third-party content is marked as such. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please notify us accordingly. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such content immediately.

sections.heading: 1. Privacy at a glance
paragraphs: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website or use our online forms.
Personal data is any data with which you can be personally identified. Detailed information on data protection can be found in the following sections of this privacy policy.

sections.heading: 2. Data controller
paragraphs:
The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:

Rösler & Engert GbR
Domstr. 18
97070 Würzburg
Germany

Phone: +49 (0) 931 45 25 28 92
Email: info@roesler-engert.de
The controller is the natural or legal person who alone or jointly with others determines the purposes and means of processing personal data.

sections.heading: 3. Hosting and server log files
paragraphs: This website is hosted by an external service provider (host). Personal data collected on this website is stored on the host's servers. This may include IP addresses, metadata and communication data, website accesses, date and time of access, browser type and version, operating system used, and referrer URL.

We use the host for the purpose of contract fulfillment with our prospective and existing customers (Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR) and in the interest of secure, fast, and efficient provision of our online offering by a professional provider (Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR).
Our host processes your data only to the extent necessary to fulfill its service obligations and acts as a processor pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR.

sections.heading: 4. Contact forms
paragraphs: If you send us inquiries via contact forms, your details from the form including the contact data you provide (e.g. name, company, email address, phone number, message) will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions.

Processing is based on Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR if your inquiry is related to the fulfillment of a contract or pre-contractual measures, and on your consent pursuant to Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR if you have given this in the form.

The data you enter will remain with us until you request deletion, revoke your consent to storage, or the purpose for data storage no longer applies. Mandatory statutory retention periods remain unaffected.

sections.heading: 5. Newsletter
paragraphs: If you would like to subscribe to the newsletter offered on the website, we require your email address and your consent to process this data.
Registration takes place exclusively with your express consent (Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR). The email address you provide for newsletter subscription will be used solely for sending the newsletter.

You can revoke your consent at any time, for example via an unsubscribe link in the newsletter or by email to info@roesler-engert.de. The lawfulness of processing already carried out remains unaffected by revocation.

sections.heading: 6. Catalog request
paragraphs: If you request our B2B catalog, we process the data you submit (e.g. name, company, email address) to provide the catalog and handle your inquiry.
The legal basis is Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR (pre-contractual measures) and your consent pursuant to Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR if you have given this in the form.

sections.heading: 7. Email delivery
paragraphs: We use the email service Resend to transmit form inquiries and notifications. The data you enter is processed via the provider's servers.
This is based on Art. 6 (1) lit. b GDPR (processing your inquiry) and Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR (efficient and secure communication). We have concluded a data processing agreement with the provider.

sections.heading: 8. External appointment booking and links
paragraphs: Our website links to an external appointment booking page. If you use this link, you leave our website. The provider of the destination page is solely responsible for data processing that takes place there.
Other external links (e.g. to social media profiles) also lead to third-party websites. Please refer to the privacy policies of the respective providers.

sections.heading: 9. Images and external content
paragraphs: To display our website, images may be loaded from external content delivery networks. Your IP address may be transmitted to the respective provider.
This is based on Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR for the appealing presentation of our online offering.

sections.heading: 10. Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right at any time to free information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data, as well as the right to rectification, blocking, or deletion of this data.

You also have the right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR), data portability (Art. 20 GDPR), and to object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR) where processing is based on Art. 6 (1) lit. e or f GDPR.
If processing is based on consent, you have the right to revoke this at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out on the basis of consent until revocation.

sections.heading: 11. Right to lodge a complaint
paragraphs: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data.
The competent supervisory authority for us is the Bavarian State Office for Data Protection Supervision (BayLDA), Promenade 18, 91522 Ansbach, Germany.

sections.heading: 12. Updates to this privacy policy
paragraphs: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy so that it always complies with current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services in the privacy policy.
For your next visit, the respective current privacy policy will apply.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are often used to make websites functional or more convenient to use.

sections.heading: Cookies on this website
paragraphs: We do not use marketing or analytics cookies on this website. No tracking tools are used for reach measurement or profiling.

When you access the website, your browser may process technically necessary information required for secure operation and delivery of the page. Language selection is handled via the URL and not via a permanently stored language cookie.
Server log files may be created when you visit. Further information can be found in our privacy policy.

sections.heading: Your choices
paragraphs: You can configure your browser to inform you about the setting of cookies, allow cookies only in individual cases, exclude the acceptance of cookies for certain cases or in general, and activate the automatic deletion of cookies when closing the browser.
If cookies are disabled, the functionality of this website may be limited.
